problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species may resolve How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
